must.title: Associated label
must.description: Input must have associated <label> element via htmlFor/id or aria-labelledby

must.title: Proper input type
must.description: Use semantic input type (text, email, tel, url, search, etc.)

must.title: Keyboard accessible
must.description: Input must be operable with keyboard only

should.title: Autocomplete attribute
should.description: Use autocomplete attribute for common fields (name, email, tel)

avoid.title: Placeholder as label
avoid.description: Don't use placeholder attribute as the only label — it disappears on input

avoid.title: Positive tabindex
avoid.description: Don't use positive tabindex values — it disrupts natural tab order

react.label: React Text Input with Error

tests.title: Label Association Test
steps: Verify label is announced with input

tests.title: Error State Test
steps: Verify input is marked as invalid
